SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Analyzer
This interface defines the methods to be implemented for an analyzer.
AnalyzerLoader
Loads analyzer plugins (JAR) and their TOML settings, then instantiates and configures analyzers in Connect.
App
Class that launches the LabBook Connect module
Connect_util
This class provides functions defined in the Connect module.
CORSFilter
Adds CORS headers to HTTP responses.
MyResource
REST endpoints of LabBook Connect used for analyzer management and HL7 exchanges.
